Operation 'getTransformedImage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is generic and doesn't convey the on-the-fly transformation capability. Description lacks specificity about what transformations are available (resize, crop, format conversion, quality, smart crop), doesn't explain the CDN caching behavior, and doesn't clarify the response format. Enhanced version includes specific transformation types consistent with API context, explains parameter optionality and combinability, clarifies the response is the image file itself, and mentions CDN caching for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve an image with optional transformations applied. All transformation parameters are optional and can be combined.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves an image from the Contentful CDN with optional on-the-fly transformations applied. Supports multiple transformation parameters including resizing, cropping, format conversion, quality adjustment, and smart cropping. All parameters are optional and can be combined. Returns the transformed image file in the requested format. Images are cached on the CDN for performance.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't convey the on-the-fly transformation capability. Description lacks specificity about what transformations are available (resize, crop, format conversion, quality, smart crop), doesn't explain the CDN caching behavior, and doesn't clarify the response format. Enhanced version includes specific transformation types consistent with API context, explains parameter optionality and combinability, clarifies the response is the image file itself, and mentions CDN caching for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.
